ogTitle: Glenormiston South vs Glenrowan: Climate Safety

heading: Glenormiston South vs Glenrowan — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Glenormiston South, Victoria and Glenrowan, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glenormiston South has a lower overall climate risk score (33/100) compared to Glenrowan (35/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Glenormiston South or Glenrowan safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Glenormiston South has a flood risk score of 34/100, while Glenrowan scores 42/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Glenormiston South scores 27/100 for bushfire risk. Glenrowan scores 38/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Glenormiston South or Glenrowan?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glenormiston South has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.7% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
